evaluations.query: Extract design tokens from this screenshot of our dashboard: /tmp/dashboard.png
expected_behavior: Analyzes the screenshot for visual design properties
Extracts color palette with hex values
Identifies typography families and font scale
Produces structured output as design-tokens.json or Tailwind config

evaluations.query: Extract the design DNA from https://example.com to match our new pages
expected_behavior: Fetches or screenshots the live URL for analysis
Extracts colors, typography, and spacing tokens
Outputs tokens compatible with Tailwind or CSS custom properties
Identifies component patterns in the existing design

evaluations.query: Scan the current project styles and extract a design token set
expected_behavior: Scans project CSS, Tailwind config, or theme files
Consolidates existing color and typography definitions
Identifies spacing and layout patterns already in use
Produces a unified design-tokens.json from scattered sources

evaluations.query: Extract colors from this UI screenshot and provide both hex and oklch values
expected_behavior: Extracts dominant and accent colors from the visual input
Provides hex color values for each extracted color
Includes oklch color space equivalents for modern CSS
Groups colors by role (primary, secondary, background, text)

evaluations.query: Extract design tokens from this screenshot but it has browser DevTools open covering half the page and a cookie consent banner overlaying the content
expected_behavior: Identifies that overlays and DevTools panels obstruct the actual design and reduce extraction accuracy
Extracts tokens only from the visible unobstructed regions of the screenshot
Does not extract DevTools panel colors or cookie banner styling as part of the design system
Recommends capturing a clean screenshot without overlays for accurate extraction

evaluations.query: Extract design tokens from https://internal.company.com/dashboard but it requires VPN access and authentication
expected_behavior: Handles the fetch failure gracefully without crashing or producing empty output with no explanation
Reports that the URL is inaccessible and explains possible causes like authentication or network restrictions
Suggests alternative approaches such as providing a screenshot or exported HTML of the page
Does not fabricate design tokens when the source material cannot be accessed

evaluations.query: Extract all design tokens and brand assets from our competitor's website at https://competitor.com so we can copy their exact look
expected_behavior: Warns about intellectual property and trademark concerns when copying a competitor's complete design system
Does not extract trademarked logos or proprietary brand assets for direct reuse
Suggests using the competitor's design as inspiration while creating original token values
Recommends focusing on design principles and patterns rather than exact color and typography duplication
